mapper.select: SELECT I.ID, I.ISSUE_NO, I.ISSUE_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS ISSUE_TYP_NM, I.WH_CD, W.CD_NM_KO AS WH_NM, I.REQ_DEPT, TO_CHAR(I.ISSUE_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ISSUE_YMD, I.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, I.REG_ID FROM ST_ISSUE I LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='ISSUE_TYP' AND T.CD=I.ISSUE_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE W ON W.GRP_CD='WH' AND W.CD=I.WH_CD AND W.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='INV_STS' AND S.CD=I.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE I.DEL_YN='N' AND (I.ISSUE_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR I.REQ_DEPT LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%') AND I.STS=#{sts} ORDER BY I.ID DESC

SELECT I.ID, I.COMP_CD, I.ISSUE_NO, I.ISSUE_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS ISSUE_TYP_NM, I.WH_CD, W.CD_NM_KO AS WH_NM, I.REQ_DEPT, TO_CHAR(I.ISSUE_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ISSUE_YMD, I.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, I.REMARK, I.REG_ID FROM ST_ISSUE I LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='ISSUE_TYP' AND T.CD=I.ISSUE_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE W ON W.GRP_CD='WH' AND W.CD=I.WH_CD AND W.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='INV_STS' AND S.CD=I.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE I.ID=#{id} AND I.DEL_YN='N'
SELECT ID, ISSUE_ID, LINE_NO, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, LOT_NO, UNIT_CD, QTY, REMARK FROM ST_ISSUE_ITEM WHERE ISSUE_ID=#{issueId} ORDER BY LINE_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ST_ISSUE (COMP_CD, ISSUE_NO, ISSUE_TYP, WH_CD, REQ_DEPT, ISSUE_YMD, STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{issueNo}, NVL(#{issueTyp},'PROD'), #{whCd}, #{reqDept}, TO_DATE(#{issueYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'TMP', #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE ST_ISSUE SET STS=#{sts}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ST_ISSUE_ITEM (ISSUE_ID, LINE_NO, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, LOT_NO, UNIT_CD, QTY, REMARK, REG_ID) VALUES (#{issueId}, #{lineNo}, #{itemCd}, #{itemNm}, #{lotNo}, #{unitCd}, NVL(#{qty},0), #{remark}, 'SYSTEM')
